summary: Website project powered by Google Custom Search using the provided search engine ID.
architectural_notes: Google Custom Search Engine ID: a566dfe30b89f4713

existing_features.title: Ensure the frontend search flow correctly passes search queries to the backend, receives Google Custom Search results, and displays them in the SearchResults component without errors.

new_feature_requests.summary: Integrate Google Custom Search with search engine ID a566dfe30b89f4713
Update the backend Google Custom Search integration to use the search engine ID 'a566dfe30b89f4713' as the `cx` parameter in all outbound Google Custom Search API requests.
